title: Debanjali
desc: A vilage woman, a great devotee of Goddess Kali, acquires healing powers. She then begins to serve the poor and needy villagers.

desc: After meeting with an accident, Payel falls in love with a man. Things turn when her father disapproves of their relationship.

desc: Shardul, a young man who has lost his memory, falls in love with Rupa, a doctor. However, when he recalls his past, he forgets Rupa.

title: Ajana Path
desc: A tea estate owner's son falls in love with one of the labourers. His son dies when the father separates them. Later, the owner's grandson returns.

title: Birodh
desc: Inspector Ashok Sharma steps into a chaotic remote station, defends the vulnerable, and battles deceit from local power players, risking his job and freedom.

desc: Baba Ramdev shows how yoga can help you. He explains different yoga poses. These poses can make your life healthier and less stressful. Learn yoga from Baba Ramdev!

desc: Tarulatha Chowdhury runs her business with her manager, Milesh. Joy is the only son of Mrs. Chowdury. Some conspiracy Joy meets with an accident. Asha helps Joy recover and they both fall in love.

title: Rakto Nodir Dhara
desc: Jaga Gunda is an international terrorist. Rupen Roy arrests him and imprison him for 21 years. However, Jaga escapes from jail with the help of a corrupt cop Dibakar and kills Rupen Roy's family.

title: Pradhan

desc: Ranjan is imprisoned as a result of a false allegation levelled against him by Sanatan. Ranjan's father becomes insane due to these developments.
